● Expand upon the ingredient/mechanism/products rich history and add credibility

● Have the authority elaborate on the Unique Mechanism/ingredient/new thing
● Describe the benefits to the reader’s health/appearance/lifestyle/finance.

offers.

reader deserves the best quality solution.
● Briefly state the author/expert/spokesperson/clients mission for doing this.
● Normally it’s reserved for [Exclusive Group] but the author/expert/spokesperson/client has
brought it to the reader at great personal expense.
● Competitors charge more.
[And Every Order is Backed By Our Money-Back Guarantee]
[GUARANTEE BADGE/SEAL]
● Assure the reader that the
author/spokesperson/expert/client has their best
intention in mind.
● State that they risk nothing while the
author/spokesperson/expert risks everything.
● Briefly explain how to leverage the guarantee.
